name: Fork
description: Attack two or more pieces simultaneously with a single piece
examples: Knight fork on king and queen

name: Pin
description: Immobilize a piece that cannot move without exposing a more valuable piece behind it

name: Skewer
description: Attack a valuable piece that must move, exposing a piece behind it to capture

name: Discovered Attack
description: Move one piece to reveal an attack by another piece behind it

name: Double Check
description: Check the king with two pieces simultaneously - king must move

name: Back Rank Mate
description: Checkmate the king trapped on the back rank by its own pawns

name: Deflection
description: Force a defending piece away from its protective duty
examples: Deflect the queen from defending mate

name: Decoy
description: Lure an enemy piece to a specific square where it can be exploited

name: Interference
description: Block the line of communication between enemy pieces

name: X-Ray Attack
description: Attack or defend through an enemy piece

name: Windmill
description: Repeated discovered checks allowing multiple captures

name: Zugzwang
description: Position where any move a player makes weakens their position

name: Trapped Piece
description: Win a piece that has no safe squares to escape to

name: Overloading
description: Exploit a piece that has too many defensive duties

name: Clearance Sacrifice
description: Sacrifice a piece to clear a square, file, or diagonal for another piece

name: Desperado
description: A doomed piece captures as much material as possible before being taken

name: Zwischenzug (Intermezzo)
description: An unexpected intermediate move inserted before the expected response

name: Removing the Defender
description: Capture or deflect the piece that protects a target

name: Attraction
description: Force the king or key piece to a dangerous square

name: Battery
description: Line up two pieces on the same file, rank, or diagonal for combined power
